description_long: This is a compact, futuristic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a predominantly red and teal color scheme. The aircraft features a large, forward-positioned, enclosed cockpit with a smooth, rounded canopy. Its wings are short, mid-mounted, and swept back, with prominent vertical stabilizers at the rear, giving it a distinctive, aggressive profile. The engines are integrated into the sides of the fuselage, each with visible circular exhausts at the back, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The surface is metallic with visible panel lines and some weathering, indicating a rugged, utilitarian design. The airplane lacks visible landing gear, and its overall form suggests a vehicle designed for rapid maneuvering in urban or confined environments.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with a red and teal metallic finish, swept mid-mounted wings, and a large forward cockpit. Twin side-mounted jet engines and tall rear vertical stabilizers define its aggressive, streamlined look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, rounded cockpit canopy, mid-mounted swept wings, and twin engine intakes flanking the fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated nose, side-mounted engines, and tall vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin circular jet exhausts, blue engine glow, and the split vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same engine and tail configuration with visible panel details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with short, swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are integrated into the fuselage with a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the sides of the fuselage, with visible circular exhausts at the rear.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in an H-tail configuration, mounted at the rear of the fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, rounded canopy; appears to be single-seat.
